g.text: • Used for: SLAM mapping, obstacle detection
• Used for: Object detection, lane detection
• Placement: Front, rear, left, right corners
All sensor data flows to RPi4 for AI/ROS2 processing
Control commands from AI or ROS2 → Arduino → Actuators
• WebSocket server for real-time data streaming
• Battery status, speed, position (GPS if available)
• Mobile app connection for quick control
• Can operate independently for emergency control
